full_text:
Lü Zhao (Zizhan) 呂昭 (子展)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lü Zhao (呂昭), styledZizhan (子展), was born in Dongping commandery. Had talent but was scorned by Huan Fan. Lü Zhao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
